message:
🐛 Fix Operators and Logs pages stats to show real data

Operators page:
- Add compute stats calculations from cluster data (nodes, CPUs,
  memory, storage, GPUs, pods)
- Implement getStatValue handlers for compute stat block IDs
- Format memory with Math.round() to avoid long decimals

Logs page:
- Add useEvents and useWarningEvents hooks for event data
- Implement getStatValue handlers for event stat block IDs (total,
  warnings, normal, recent, errors)
- Fix default cards to use events_timeline instead of non-existent
  warning_events card type

Both pages were showing 0 for all stats because their getStatValue
functions only handled 'clusters' and 'healthy' IDs, but their
dashboardType expects different stat block IDs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
